programme.desc: Dokumentari yang menyusuri keindahan dan sejarah Sungai Johor, menyingkap peranannya dalam kehidupan masyarakat setempat. Ia memaparkan budaya, tradisi dan warisan yang berkembang di sepanjang sungai ini yang menunjukkan kepentingannya dalam ekonomi dan sosial komuniti sekitar.

programme.title: Sembilu 2
programme.desc: Percintaan Awie dan Wati terus diuji dengan kisah silam yang kian menghantui mereka. Lakonan Erra Fazira, Awie dan Ziana Zain.

programme.title: Chomel
programme.desc: Setelah kematian ibunya, keluarga Mimi berantakan. Satu hari, Mimi terjumpa seekor kucing, Chomel dan membawanya pulang. Kehadiran Chomel menyebabkan berlaku peristiwa yang menyatukan keluarganya semula.

programme.title: Cikgu Gangster
programme.desc: Seorang gangster tersesat dalam hutan lalu menyelinap ke dalam sebuah kem motivasi dan meyamar sebagai guru sementara yang bertugas memantau pelajar nakal. Lakonan Syed Ali, Siti Saleha, Zaidi Omar, Hafiz Zaki

programme.title: Adiwira Ku
programme.desc: Berdasarkan dari kisah benar mengenai pasukan 'choral speaking' SMK Pinang Tunggal di Kedah yang mengharungi pelbagai kepayahan dan cabaran demi untuk memenangi pertandingan tersebut.

programme.title: Karya 12 Vol 2: Pentas Haiwan
programme.desc: Kisah seorang guru yang menjadi guru sementara untuk mengajar kanak-kanak kelas lemah menghadapi cabaran daripada orang sekeliling dan juga pengetuanya.

programme.title: Satu Malam Perawan
programme.desc: Aisyah dan adiknya, Mira telah diculik dan dijual kepada Mummy Nora. Di situ, kehidupan Aisyah berubah dan menderita. Apakah kesudahan nasib Aisyah? Lakonan Diana Danielle, Erin Malek, Wan Nur Azlin dan Sheila Rusly.

programme.title: Ahmad Albab
programme.desc: Seorang anak yang tidak henti menangis diberi nama Ahmad Albab kerana sukakan pintu. Apakah tuah yang dibawanya? Lakonan P.Ramlee dan Saloma.

programme.title: Walid Ep04
programme.desc: Ummi Hafizah mengaku "Nabi Perempuan" dan memimpin ritual kontroversi. Saat Habiburrahman merancang rampasan kuasa, undang-undang mula mencengkam ahli atasan Walid yang ditahan.

programme.title: Sembilu
programme.desc: Percintaan Wati dan Awie mendapat tentangan hebat oleh keluarga Wati. Muncul pula Ziana sebagai orang ketiga.Lakonan Erra Fazira dan Awie.

programme.title: Suara Kekasih (HD)
programme.desc: Kisah percintaan terhalang dan terlarang di antara seorang artis dengan seorang pemuda dari keluarga berada. Lakonan Fauziah Ahmad Daud, Azmil Mustapha, Norlida Ahmad (Connie) dan Datin Rosnani Jamil.

programme.title: Senario The Movie Episod 2 Beach Boys
programme.desc: The Beach Boys - Azlee, Mazlan dan Wahid kembali untuk menyempurnakan misi mereka menyelamatkan sebuah resort yang hampir ditutup.

programme.title: Bulan & Pria Terhebat
programme.desc: Bulan, seorang pelatih dalam pasukan khas Indonesia, memulai perjalanannya di sebuah sindiket pemerdagangan manusia untuk mencari saudara perempuannya yang diculik, Melati.

programme.title: Fathers & Daughters
programme.desc: Seorang penulis bergelar bapa tunggal cuba bangkit semula dan cuba merebut hak penjagaan ke atas anaknya selepas dia mengalami episod gangguan mental akibat kemalangan tragis.

programme.title: Anak Mami The Movie
programme.desc: Aniq dan Amelia berpakat sertai 'keluarga angkat' untuk memenangi hati keluarga masing‑masing, namun rancangan mereka rumit apabila Mami Jarum mahu menjodohkan Aniq dengan Mehran

programme.title: Sepi
programme.desc: Filem drama romantik ini mengisahkan tiga orang insan yang hidup berasingan namun sama-sama mengenal erti cinta, kehilangan dan kesepian. Lakonan Afdlin Shauki, Vanida Imran dan Nasha Aziz.

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Penjara Abah
programme.desc: Natasha merupakan seorang kanak-kanak pintar namun dinafikan hak belajar oleh ayahnya. Dengan bantuan Cikgu Atok, Natasha berjaya bersekolah namun ada harga yang harus dibayar.

programme.title: Lembut Bukan Lelaki (HD)
programme.desc: Kisah seorang gadis bernama Lembut yang terpaksa berkorban menggugurkan cita-citanya dan menjadi nelayan demi keluarganya yang hidup dilanda kemiskinan. Dibintangi oleh Sharifah Amani, Namron dan Aliza Shadan.

programme.title: Karya 12 Vol 2: Pentas Haiwan
programme.desc: Kisah seorang guru yang menjadi guru sementara untuk mengajar kanak-kanak kelas lemah menghadapi cabaran daripada orang sekeliling dan juga pengetuanya.

programme.title: Karya 12 Vol 2: Sekolah Api
programme.desc: Api, gangster yang meningkat naik cuba memenuhi amanat arwah neneknya untuk menghabiskan SPM. Dia jatuh cinta dengan guru Bahasa Inggeris dan sanggup melakukan apa saja untuk memenangi hati guru tersebut.

programme.title: Cinta Kolestrol
programme.desc: Kisah cinta Fazira dan Ahmad Yusry yang dijodohkan sedari kecil namun bila dewasa saiz badan pula menjadi ukuran dan cinta hanyalah bahan gurauan. Dibintangi oleh Erra Fazira dan Yusry Abdul Halim,

programme.title: Walid Ep05
programme.desc: Ustaz Fateh bersemuka dengan Ummi Hafizah soal dakwaan kufur, memaksanya bertaubat secara terbuka. Walid bersiap untuk Malam Keberkatan, sementara Habiburrahman hadir dengan tawaran mengejutkan.

programme.title: Maria Mariana
programme.desc: Maria dan Mariana dua adik beradik yang mempunyai perwatakan berbeza berdepan dengan konflik kehidupan dan percintaaan. Lakonan Erra Fazira dan Ziana Zain

programme.desc: Saksikan pengembaraan Wahid, Mazlan dan Azlee dalam mencapai cita-cita mereka menjadi bintang sehinggakan mereka disangka perompak yang menjadi buruan polis.

programme.desc: Jeff bertindak menghalang perkahwinan Ali dan Asmidar dengan memfitnah Ali kepada ayah Asmidar. Lakonan Azmil Mustapha, Shasha dan Allahyarham Izi Yahya.

programme.title: Swordswomen Three

programme.title: Challenge of the Gamesters
programme.desc: A master gambler and his partner are recruited to investigate a Shanghai tycoon suspected of using his casino as a front for espionage. Now, they must win this deadly game of skill and deception.

programme.title: Rose, Be My Love
programme.desc: A love rectangle lies at the heart of this romantic drama with an eve of World War II setting. Starring Kwan Shan, Li Ting.

programme.title: Mr Funny Bone
programme.desc: Whenever Mr. Funny Bone travels about with his sidekick Big Potato, he often gets involved in all manner of charming comic mishaps.

programme.title: The Tigress of Shaolin
programme.desc: Hui Ying-hung co-stars with Liu Chia-yung in this fast-paced comedy that features the outrageous Leprosy Boxing style.

programme.title: The Emperor and the Minister
programme.desc: From veteran director Li Han-hsiang comes this fascinating period drama, starring Li Kun as the ingenious Lord Liu, who is much envied by the Emperor.

programme.title: The Magnificent Swordsman
programme.desc: A village boy recruits his friends to help peasants rid their village of marauding bandits, the leader being the man who killed his family.

programme.title: My Name Ain't Suzie
programme.desc: A poor young woman becomes a popular bargirl in Hong Kong's gritty response to Hollywood's The World of Suzie Wong.

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: A Shaolin hero and the vicious Pai Mei lock horns in this kungfu revenge tale that spans two generations.

programme.desc: Huangmei Opera queen, Ivy Ling Po stars in this tale of a young scholar who is manipulated into marrying a nobleman's reluctant daughter a girl who is dying.

programme.title: Heroes of Sung
programme.desc: In this period action film, Meng Hung (Shih Szu) must work with Fan Tien-Fu (Lo Lieh) to protect the royal seals of the Sung Dynasty.

programme.title: Rear Entrance
programme.desc: This moving tale centers on a childless woman who cares for an emotionally battered girl.

programme.title: The Voyage of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Li Han Hsiang brings us this delightful adventure, which revolves around Emperor Chien Lung's incognito journey through China.

programme.title: Twin Blades of Doom
programme.desc: A man who left the martial world returns to action and goes on the road to vengeance after the evil Ghost Gang kills his parents.

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples

programme.title: Six Assassins
programme.desc: Ling Yun of 'Hellgate' plays a magician-warrior who unwittingly protects a villain from an ambush, until his wife and friend's deaths open his eyes.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: See how Prince 4 tries his hardest to kill the heir apparent, Prince 14 and how, out of frustration, he finally engages an assassin to do the job.

programme.title: Empress Wu

programme.title: Dragon Swamp

programme.title: Carpool
programme.desc: Daniel Miller has to take care of the carpool for his sons and the neighbourhood school children when his wife falls sick. However, in the course of the day, he finds himself a victim of a robbery.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: After suffering from memory loss, a soldier returns to his former profession as a barber and attempts to escape persecution by the military forces.

programme.title: St. Vincent
programme.desc: Maggie, a working single mother, allows Vincent, a hedonistic misanthrope, to babysit her 12-year-old son Oliver. Soon, a beautiful friendship develops between Vincent and Oliver.

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler.

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: The heir to a political dynasty falls for a hotel maid who is also single mother, thinking of her to be a socialite. However, both realise that they are completely different as the truth comes out.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: Eager to know how her soon-to-be divorced parents met, Maya listens to her father, who shares his past romantic relationships and how he ended up marrying her mother.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Eight very different couples and their love lives intertwine during a hectic month before Christmas in London.

programme.title: Shall We Dance?
programme.desc: John Clark, a lawyer, finds his marriage losing its spark. In an attempt to find a new passion for himself, he enrols in a dance studio where Paulina catches his eye.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie secretly invites three of her mother's former lovers to her upcoming wedding. In doing so, she hopes to discover the true identity of her biological father before the ceremony takes place.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: A small team of elite American intelligence officers, part of a top-secret tactical command unit, try to smuggle a mysterious police officer with sensitive information out of Indonesia.

programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
programme.desc: Living with abundant resources, 12-year-old cello prodigy Reggie lives a solitary life in Manhattan; estranged from family, jobless, and having boyfriend problems.

programme.title: Coral Sea Dreaming

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In South Korea, Rooftop and Catfish take on some daring (and borderline stupid) activities. They become the first BMX bikers to every ride at the North Korean/South Korean boarder, scale Korea's skyscrapers, become sword-smiths, and train in the ancient art of tae kwon do. But the fun doesn't stop there. The duo find themselves in the center of a mud festival and trying out the tightrope art of ju

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this special episode, we take you around the world for a look at never-before-seen shenanigans of the BMX duo, and you won't believe some of the activities that didn't make the previous episodes. Rooftop and Catfish hatch crocodiles, get maced in a gas chamber, attempt to grow Catfish a few inches, race tuk tuk carts in Thailand, and so much more. They try out a Romanian banya sauna, ride a hum

programme.title: Feral
programme.desc: In the land of ten thousand lakes, Leech Lake stands out, because it's the third largest lake located entirely within the state of Minnesota. Known as a destination for walleye, pike and muskie fishing, Leech Lake attracts fishermen from all over the Midwest... and that's where the trouble began. Fishermen from the Ohio River Basin brought rusty crawfish up to Leech Lake as bait... and when done f

programme.title: Feral
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a "trash fish." Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targ

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: Bear's Mission With Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: Kangaroo Mob

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: Lost River
programme.desc: Billy, a struggling single mother, gets pulled into a dangerous underworld while her son discovers a hidden underwater town.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: Julie Powell, a young blogger, is determined to emulate Julia Child's cooking techniques. Though separated by time, the two women share a common passion for food that intertwines their lives.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Reginald's manager helps him rise to fame, but also creates chaos in his life.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Somali pirates attack the Maersk Alabama, a container ship, while it is on its course to Kenya. Richard Phillips, the captain of the ship, uses his wits to negotiate with them to save his crew.

programme.title: La La Land
programme.desc: When a pianist and an actress follow their passion and achieve success in their respective fields, they find themselves torn between their love for each other and their careers.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: After spending eight months in a mental institution, a man tries to start a new life.

programme.title: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Grant, a wanted man and a former member of the revolutionary militant group, the Weather Underground, goes on the run after a journalist reveals his identity.

programme.title: Ghost Father
programme.desc: A student is hired to look after the little girl of a wealthy single mom who is usually away for work. The mother and daughter live in a mansion located in near a pine forest. Come nightfall, the strangest things happen in the house. The nanny cannot help but notice, and she feels as though there is someone - or something - watching her. Yet the more she tries to uncover the truth, the more she ge

programme.title: Conjuring Spirit
programme.desc: In the wake of her husband's betrayal, a detective writer and her 5-year-old son move into an old apartment where they receive a strange music box by chance. Tormented by horrible nightmares, she determines to find out the truth behind the spooky music box and the angry spirit within.

programme.title: Pengabdi Setan 2
programme.desc: Several years after a terrible incident cost their mother and youngest sibling their lives, Rini and her siblings Toni and Bondi live with their father in flats. They believe living in flats with many people is safe, but they soon realize this might be dangerous if they don't know their neighbors. On a night full of terror, Rini and her family must save themselves.

programme.title: Malam Tahlil Suhaila Balik
programme.desc: In bearing the pain of Suhaila's death, her husband faces an unexpectedly problem when she returns home at one of his 'tahlil' nights.

programme.title: Janin Emas (Ko-Mun-Thong)
programme.desc: Alia and Amran move into a new house with their daughter Dania, who finds King Ravana's Mask in a storeroom, unleashing strange and eerie events.

programme.title: The Story of the Death
programme.desc: Border patrol Police Lieutenant Aod, sends his subordinates to bust a drug trafficking operation. Due to serving on the force for many years, he was away from his parents for a long time. Therefore, he requested to be transferred back to Bangkok to care for his parents. Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.title: Susuk
programme.desc: Imran is a good son to his mother. He takes care of his mother even though his mother has been behaving strangely ever since she fell sick. This had Imran thinking that his mother is possibly practicing a black magic called Susuk. Imran asks for advice from a religious man in the mosque to help him remove the Susuk.

programme.title: Exorcism : Haunted Child
programme.desc: My Lan, a singer who has lost her voice, often thinks that 'there is no such thing as ghosts.' When she is assigned to attend an art school to complete a special director training course, she is requested to move to the upper floor of the school throughout the course. From then on, My Lan is constantly haunted by mysterious beings that alter her belief in the existence of ghost.

programme.title: Hospital
programme.desc: Amira, a village girl, comes to the city to interview for the position of nurse in a hospital. While trying to find the hospital, she meets Dahlia who works there. Amira is accepted for the position and Dahlia invites her to be her housemate. Ever since then, Amira is haunted by spooky encounters and even starts to see ominous shadows. Her acquaintance with a young doctor, Farid, adds to all the c

programme.title: Uri
programme.desc: Setelah mengalami kecelakaan, Rahmat yang menyedari yang dia adalah anak angkat mula menjejaki keluarga kandungnya di Sarawak. Berjayakah usahanya itu? Lakonan Beto Khusairy.

programme.title: Pengabdi Setan
programme.desc: A mother finally passes away after suffering for three years from an unknown disease. With his wife gone, the father leaves the children to go work out of town. Eerie situations soon take place as the children discover that their mother has come back to visit them and is taking them along on her new journey.

programme.title: Janin Emas (Ko-Mun-Thong)
programme.desc: Alia and Amran move into a new house with their daughter Dania, who finds King Ravana's Mask in a storeroom, unleashing strange and eerie events.

programme.title: Main-Main Hantu
programme.desc: A team of netball players spend the night in a dilapidated bungalow taken care of by an elderly couple. They are spooked by things that go bump in the night. Is it spirits, or something far more nefarious?

programme.title: The Story of the Death
programme.desc: Border patrol Police Lieutenant Aod, sends his subordinates to bust a drug trafficking operation. Due to serving on the force for many years, he was away from his parents for a long time. Therefore, he requested to be transferred back to Bangkok to care for his parents. Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.title: Kampong Pisang Bersiri Siri Ep13
programme.desc: Kg. Pisang is shocked by the death of Pak Din. Pak Jabit holds an election to pick the new village chief. Chaos ensues when a hantu Raya appears.

programme.title: Susuk
programme.desc: Imran is a good son to his mother. He takes care of his mother even though his mother has been behaving strangely ever since she fell sick. This had Imran thinking that his mother is possibly practicing a black magic called Susuk. Imran asks for advice from a religious man in the mosque to help him remove the Susuk.

programme.title: Arena Panas : Pro VS Bro S1 Ep02
programme.desc: Dirempuh! Ditindih! Diangka! Boleh ke Bro kita tewaskan Pro Ragbi yang gagah lagi perkasa tu? Dengar cerita, 1 Bro dah tumbang. Harap-harap Hero Remaja; Aqil, Akad & Fazziq dapat bantu Bro kalahkan Pro.
